settings.subheading: The Meaning Behind the Sana Collection Stones
settings.title: The Stories We Carry
settings.description:
In the daily push and pull of our lives or the haste of our mornings, it’s not a ritual we’re often encouraged to reflect deeply on. But it’s important – the purpose of our seemingly ordinary amulets.

The significance behind the menagerie of rings, delicate bracelets interwoven over time, earrings we never remove. Jewellery has always been a vessel for meaning – a way to mark a moment, to honour a journey, to hold something close.

settings.content_intro:
DO: BUY WHAT YOU LOVE

Natalie: Simply, a piece of vintage jewellery should be chosen because it resonates with you, and because you fall in love with it. Not only are they imbued with the histories and stories of their past owners, but vintage jewellery also provides an opportunity to embrace sustainable purchasing habits – offering once-cherished designs a second (or third) lease on life.

I have always had a love for vintage jewellery, or vintage anything really. I used to spend hours in op shops collecting all sorts of odd finds – furniture, clothes, hats, even once a vintage suitcase which I used to transport and display my first ever collection! I love the mystery and enigmatic nature of vintage pieces, the opportunity for speculation on their history and journey. I also have a deep reverence for the incredible craftsmanship many of these piece’s hold. So much tradition and heritage exists in every tiny detail, which is where my love for vintage jewellery originates from.

I encourage you to find your spark. Is it a particular stone colour or cut, the setting or design style or maybe even the piece’s provenance and era that speaks to you? Is it because it reminds you of a place, someone special or loved ones from generations past? I always like to remind clients that jewellery doesn’t have to be engraved or marked with a special stone to become solely yours – it can be anything about the piece that sparks a feeling or takes you back to a moment in time.

There’s a sense of romance and allure inherit in vintage pieces, and finding the perfect design should feel akin to falling in love: a lightning bolt of recognition; the sense that you two were destined to be connected.

settings.description:
In designing the Sana collection, we worked with our talented design team and artisans to create pieces that not only feel adept in signifying womanhood in all its forms, but serve as tangible markers of the stories we carry.

At the heart of this collection are four stones: Cherry Blossom Agate, Calcite, Aventurine, and Jasper. Like the meaning that sparked the collection’s origins, these stones are imbued with their own symbolism – each one a talisman for different seasons of life; a reflection of the wearer’s own evolution.

settings.title: "The jewellery we wear is more than adornment—it’s a reflection of our journey, a quiet keeper of the stories we carry."

settings.description_mobile:
Cherry Blossom Agate

Delicate yet powerful, Cherry Blossom Agate (also known as Sakura Agate) is a stone of quiet transformation. Like the first bloom of spring following a long winter, it nurtures growth and encourages new beginnings, serving as a gentle reminder that change unfolds in its own time. Cherry Blossom Agate is imbued with an energy of hope and perseverance, making it fitting talisman for those embracing fresh chapters, creativity, or emotional renewal.

Calcite

Known for its cleansing and amplifying properties, Calcite is a stone of clarity, expansion, and possibility. It acts as a guide, clearing mental fog and bringing a sense of renewed energy (both physically and spiritually). A amulet for personal growth, Calcite encourages fresh perspectives and emotional balance, making it a perfect companion for those navigating new paths or seeking a deeper connection within themselves.

settings.title: Jasper
settings.description: Deeply grounding and protective, Jasper is a stone of strength, stability, and resilience. Like the earth itself, it provides a sense of steadiness in times of uncertainty, offering support to those moving through change. A touchstone for endurance and courage, Jasper serves as a reminder to stand firm, exhale deeply, and trust in the unfolding of one's path. Whether layered together as a symbol of growth and regeneration, or gifted to mark a significant moment in a loved one’s journey, the Sana collection pieces are mindfully crafted reminders of the past, guides for the present, and touchstones for the future.

settings.description:
Aventurine

Shaped by dichotomies – softness and strength – Aventurine is often referred to as the stone of the heart. It soothes emotional wounds, nurtures self-compassion, and inspires a quiet confidence rooted in inner balance. For those seeking harmony, Aventurine encourages trust in the journey, reminding the wearer to welcome opportunities with an open heart and a grounded sense of self.

Jasper

Deeply grounding and protective, Jasper is a stone of strength, stability, and resilience. Like the earth itself, it provides a sense of steadiness in times of uncertainty, offering support to those moving through change. A touchstone for endurance and courage, Jasper serves as a reminder to stand firm, exhale deeply, and trust in the unfolding of one's path.Whether layered together as a symbol of growth and regeneration, or gifted to mark a significant moment in a loved one’s journey, the Sana collection pieces are mindfully crafted reminders of the past, guides for the present, and touchstones for the future.

settings.title: Sana
settings.description:
Held In Love, Carried Through Time.

Sana is a tribute to womanhood in all its forms – an offering to those who mother, those who support, those who carry love in their hands and history in their hearts.
